summary: Frontend-only testing of mobile SMM editing, archive dialog styling, navigation tab order, and desktop dashboard. All requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Mobile bottom navigation tab order is CORRECT: завдання, smm, події, аналітика, налаштування
Mobile SMM settings editing works - clicking on SMM task opens edit dialog with editable fields
Mobile archive dialog displays tasks with icons using task-item styling (same as task list)
Desktop dashboard loads with 3 columns: ЗАВДАННЯ, SMM, ПОДІЇ
Desktop archive modal shows tasks with icons in 3-column layout
SMM edit dialog has name input, days_before input, and icon selector
Save and cancel buttons work in SMM edit dialog
Archive shows 5 task items with proper icons and checkboxes
Desktop archive has 3 sections: завдання, smm завдання, завершені події
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features have been verified working: (1) Mobile SMM edit dialog opens when clicking SMM tasks in settings, (2) Mobile archive shows tasks with icons matching task list styling, (3) Mobile bottom nav has correct 5-tab order, (4) Desktop dashboard has 3 columns, (5) Desktop archive modal has consistent styling with icons. No issues found.
